# img-previewer — attribution

Powers the click-to-zoom lightbox on the Screenshots page.

**[img-previewer](https://github.com/yue1123/img-previewer)** v2.1.7 — © dh — MIT License.
`img-previewer.min.js` and `index.css`, vendored here unmodified (via jsdelivr) rather than
loaded from a live CDN at page-load time, matching every other third-party asset in this project.

See the root `LICENSING.md` and `NOTICE` for the project-wide licensing summary this entry is
consistent with.
